text.title: Instagram Ads Playbook Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real instagram-ads engagements. Each pairs a symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Campaign runs only on Feed; CPM 40% above benchmark; reach low.
antipattern.root-cause: Author copied FB campaign without IG-specific config.

antipattern.symptom: Polished brand video on cold IG audience; CTR 0.5%; CPA 3x retarget.
antipattern.fix: Use UGC / creator for cold; reserve brand-polished for retargeting + warm.

antipattern.symptom: Ecom IG ad with no Shopping tags; CTR -25%; product page bounce.
antipattern.root-cause: Feed not linked or tags not approved.
antipattern.fix: Approve Shopping setup; tag every product ad.
